description_long: This is a rectangular wooden desk with a smooth, polished surface and rounded corners. The desk features three vertically stacked drawers on the right side, each with a horizontal handle, and an open shelf space above the drawers. The left side of the desk is supported by a solid panel, while the back panel is partially covered with a textured, fabric-like material. The wood grain is visible throughout, giving the desk a warm, natural appearance. The overall design is functional and utilitarian, suitable for work or study environments.
description: A rectangular wooden desk with three right-side drawers, an open shelf, and a partially fabric-covered back panel.
description_view_0: Front-right view showing the three drawers, open shelf, and the main work surface.
description_view_1: Rear-right view highlighting the wood grain on the side and the depth of the drawers.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the fabric-covered panel and the solid wood construction on the right.
description_view_3: Rear-left view showing the fabric panel and the left support leg.
attribute_orientation: The side with the drawers and open shelf is intended to face the user, serving as the front, while the fabric-covered panel is at the back.
